name: Trimble Inc.
description: Trimble Inc. is a leading industrial technology company that provides positioning, modeling, connectivity, and data analytics solutions. The company serves a diverse range of industries, including construction, geospatial, agriculture, and transportation. By integrating hardware, software, and services, Trimble helps customers transform their physical and digital workflows to improve productivity, quality, safety, and sustainability. Headquartered in Westminster, Colorado, Trimble operates globally, delivering innovative technology that enables professionals to measure, build, grow, and move the world more efficiently through connected, data-driven solutions that address complex operational challenges across various sectors.
